summary: Site reliability and platform-focused engineer with 5+ years building cloud infrastructure, CI/CD automation, and production-safe delivery systems. Recent work cut provisioning from 2+ hours to under 10 minutes with Terraform-driven environments and strengthened release reliability with quality gates, deploy-on-merge workflows, and tighter secret isolation.

bullets: Designed the infrastructure, environment model, and CI/CD strategy to bring a startup from PoC to production-ready; migrated from AWS to GCP using Terraform with identity-based deployments and dev/prod environment separation, cutting provisioning from 2+ hours to under 10 minutes.

Hardened the CI/CD pipeline and release model: enforced quality gates on every PR with automated deploy-on-merge, pinned supply chain dependencies, isolated CI credentials, and scoped secrets per environment.
Built backend services for a commerce platform with Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and domain-driven design, preserving a clean path from application work to production delivery.

Managed delivery infrastructure across Azure DevOps and self-hosted GitLab CE on Linux, maintaining pipeline reliability, runner availability, and deployment readiness while reducing release preparation overhead by 30+ minutes.

Restructured a critical reporting path from application-layer execution to database-native execution in SQL Server, resolving a recurring bottleneck across healthcare and finance platforms and cutting runtime from 3 minutes to 4 seconds.
Delivered backend services in ASP.NET Core for government research and financial services clients; provisioned and operated AWS environments with EC2, S3, and RDS for production and test workloads.
Sustained production stability and data integrity across B2B and internal ERP systems, managing 20+ monthly releases over 16 months against business-critical operational constraints.
Resolved 8+ critical production issues annually through structured debugging and query optimization; assessed infrastructure modernization paths for legacy system upgrades.

projects.title: Production Infrastructure Foundation
projects.description: Built Terraform-based cloud environments, identity-based deployments, and release automation for a startup going from PoC to production.

projects.title: Delivery Reliability Operations
projects.description: Operated Linux-based CI/CD systems used by multiple teams and reduced release preparation overhead by 30+ minutes.
